meta.name: timeline-pulse story threads
meta.note: Curated narrative arcs. Every thread is written three times — belief frame, neutral archive frame, skeptical frame — so no single voice owns the story. `anchor_label` is a display hint.

threads.title: Collider as threshold
threads.public_summary: How communities turn high-energy physics milestones into threshold symbolism.
threads.belief_frame: The collider is humanity knocking on the origin of matter from the outside — every collision a question asked with force, every discovery a door left ajar.
threads.neutral_frame: Records how communities turn high-energy physics milestones into symbols of threshold, origin-search, and reality instability.
threads.skeptical_frame: The LHC is a particle accelerator. Official sources describe research, maintenance, and upgrades — instruments, not doors.
suggested_questions: Collect three origin-quest metaphors used for other big instruments — telescopes, submersibles, seed vaults.

threads.title: Machine silence calibration
threads.public_summary: The 2026–2030 shutdown read as a symbolic pause: playlists, rituals, journaling, quiet-machine language.
threads.belief_frame: While the machine rests, the inner field can finally be heard. The pause is not downtime — it is the practice window.
threads.neutral_frame: Clusters reports linking the 2026–2030 shutdown to a symbolic pause: playlists, rituals, journaling methods, quiet-machine language.
threads.skeptical_frame: LS3 is scheduled maintenance and upgrade work for HiLumi, planned and published years in advance.
suggested_questions: Map "quiet machine" language across monastic, musical, and engineering vocabularies.

threads.title: Rainbow bridge restoration
threads.public_summary: Stories about spectrum, missing wholeness, and repair — the lost element as connective image.
threads.belief_frame: A missing color — a lost ion of light — waits to be returned, so the bridge between matter and spirit can carry weight again.
threads.neutral_frame: Groups stories about spectrum, missing wholeness, and repair; the lost element is the connective image.
threads.skeptical_frame: Rainbows are dispersion. No color is missing from the spectrum; the missing piece is a narrative device.
suggested_questions: Trace rainbow-bridge cosmology across at least three cultures without merging them into one.

threads.title: Serpent time wound
threads.public_summary: Serpent, loop, wound, poison-remedy, and timeline-repair language wherever it recurs.
threads.belief_frame: Time is a serpent with a wound; linear experience is the scar. Healing the wound turns poison into remedy and the line back into a circle.
threads.neutral_frame: Groups serpent, loop, wound, poison-remedy, and timeline-repair language wherever it recurs in the corpus.
threads.skeptical_frame: Ouroboros symbolism is thousands of years old and needs no physics to be meaningful — which is rather the point.
suggested_questions: Compare loop-healing metaphors in myth with narrative time-loop fiction of the last decade.

threads.title: Heart collider
threads.public_summary: A recurring contrast between external technology and inner integration.
threads.belief_frame: The true collider is internal: the heart reconciles opposites without violence — the only accelerator that runs on stillness.
threads.neutral_frame: Captures a recurring contrast between external technology and inner integration across practice notes and teachings.
threads.skeptical_frame: A metaphor of interiority — meaningful as practice language, not as physics. Filed accordingly.
suggested_questions: Collect "inner instrument" metaphors from contemplative traditions, old and new.

threads.title: Mandela waves
threads.public_summary: How memory anomalies cluster into wave-like periods around cultural and technological milestones.
threads.belief_frame: Shared misrememberings are bleed-through — residue from a branch nearby, surfacing where memories were anchored young.
threads.neutral_frame: Records how memory anomalies cluster into wave-like periods around cultural and technological milestones.
threads.skeptical_frame: Reconstructive memory plus internet-scale comparison produces convergent errors — the waves track attention, not branches.
suggested_questions: Chart when each classic item first appears online versus when people remember it from.

threads.title: Apophis window
threads.public_summary: A symbolic astronomical anchor, stored with strict sourcing flags.
threads.belief_frame: The 2029 passage is a serpent-of-chaos moment — a window where what threatens can be transmuted into what heals.
threads.neutral_frame: A symbolic astronomical anchor, stored with strict sourcing flags until official close-approach details are cited.
threads.skeptical_frame: A well-tracked close approach with published orbital data. Ephemerides are not omens.
suggested_questions: Source the official close-approach details before expanding this thread any further.

threads.title: Silicon mirror
threads.public_summary: The symbolic bridge between mineral, computation, and consciousness language.
threads.belief_frame: Stone learned to think. In the chip, matter reflects mind back at itself — the simulation is the mirror finally polished.
threads.neutral_frame: Captures the symbolic bridge between mineral, computation, and consciousness language across the corpus.
threads.skeptical_frame: Semiconductors are engineering. The mirror is a metaphor we bring to them — and always have, with every new machine.
suggested_questions: Trace "thinking stone" imagery from alchemy to computing marketing.
